title: Framework Operator
learning_objectives: Select appropriate Metasploit modules for identified vulnerabilities
Perform post-exploitation enumeration on compromised systems
scenario: Three vulnerable machines with known Metasploit exploits. Gain access to each, then perform post-exploitation enumeration.

scenario_context.setting: Lab environment with intentionally vulnerable systems
scenario_context.challenge: Successfully exploit multiple machines and extract maximum intelligence
scenario_context.relevance: Metasploit is industry-standard framework; essential skill

subtasks.title: Target Analysis & Module Selection
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Identify vulnerable services on each target. Research matching Metasploit exploits. Create selection matrix showing target, service, vulnerability, and module.

subtasks.title: Exploitation — Machine 1
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Configure module with target details and payload. Execute exploit. Establish meterpreter session. Document command sequence and output.

subtasks.title: Exploitation — Machine 2
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Use different exploit/module than Machine 1. Handle any failures. Document troubleshooting steps taken. Successful session establishment.

subtasks.title: Exploitation — Machine 3
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Final target may have AV/IDS. Use payload encoding. Test different encoders if initial fails. Establish session.

subtasks.title: Post-Exploitation Demo
subtasks.description: Sysinfo, file access, network info per machine.
subtasks.detailed_guidance: On each compromised machine, execute post-exploitation commands: sysinfo, ifconfig, route, netstat, hashdump. Document findings.

subtasks.title: Campaign Report
subtasks.detailed_guidance: Write report with module selection matrix, exploitation timeline, post-exploitation findings, and recommendations per target.

reflection_prompt: How did different vulnerabilities require different exploitation approaches? What post-exploitation data was most valuable?

quiz.question: What is the primary advantage of meterpreter sessions over basic shell access?
quiz.explanation: Meterpreter provides a rich environment with built-in post-exploitation capabilities like hashdump, file system access, and process manipulation.

quiz.question: When should you use payload encoding in Metasploit?
options: When AV/IDS may detect the payload
quiz.explanation: Payload encoding obfuscates exploits to bypass antivirus and IDS detection when direct payload delivery would be blocked.

portfolio_artifacts: Machine 3 exploitation log with encoding techniques
mentor_notes: Evaluate module selection logic and successful exploitation rate. Troubleshooting documentation shows deeper understanding. Post-exploitation should extract meaningful intelligence. 72-hour deadline is reasonable for three targets.
